tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with blue glaze finish, perfect for bathrooms and accent walls. The deep blue hue adds a touch of ocean-inspired tranquility to any space.
tiles.creator: Studio Cerámica

tiles.title: Marble White Slab
tiles.description: Luxury white marble with delicate grey veining. This large format slab offers a seamless, opulent look ideal for high-end residential projects and hotel lobbies.
tiles.creator: Milano Stone Craft

tiles.title: Granite Grey Textured
tiles.description: Durable textured granite designed for high-traffic areas. Its slip-resistant surface and speckled grey pattern make it an excellent choice for commercial spaces and outdoor patios.
tiles.creator: EarthWorks

tiles.title: Terrazzo Earth Mix
tiles.description: Modern terrazzo embedded with earthy stone chips. This vibrant and playful tile adds character to mid-century modern interiors and trendy cafes.
tiles.creator: Terrazzo Co.

tiles.title: Porcelain Wood Look
tiles.description: Porcelain tile that mimics the warmth of natural wood without the maintenance. Ideal for living rooms and bedrooms.
tiles.creator: Lumber Ceramics

tiles.title: Subway White Gloss
tiles.description: Classic white subway tile with a glossy finish. A timeless choice for kitchen backsplashes and bathroom walls.
tiles.creator: Metro Tile Co.

tiles.title: Hexagon Matte Black
tiles.description: Bold matte black hexagon tiles for a striking modern aesthetic. Perfect for contemporary bathroom floors.
tiles.creator: Geo Shapes

tiles.title: Travertine Natural Stone
tiles.description: Authentic travertine stone tile with natural pitting and warm beige tones. Brings a touch of rustic elegance.
tiles.creator: Nature Stone Imports

tiles.title: Moroccan Patterned Encaustic
tiles.description: Vibrant encaustic cement tile featuring intricate Moroccan patterns. Adds a global flair to entryways and patios.
tiles.creator: Artisan Tiles

tiles.title: Glass Mosaic Aqua
tiles.description: Shimmering aqua glass mosaic tiles that reflect light beautifully. Ideal for swimming pools and shower accents.
tiles.creator: Crystal Mosaics

tiles.title: Slate Dark Grey
tiles.description: Durable natural slate in deep grey hues with a cleft finish. Excellent slip resistance for outdoor walkways.
tiles.creator: EarthWorks

tiles.title: Metallic Bronze Glaze
tiles.description: Ceramic tile with a unique metallic bronze glaze. Creates a dramatic, industrial-chic focal point.
tiles.creator: Industrial Aesthetics

tiles.title: Penny Round Mint
tiles.description: Charming mint green penny round tiles. A playful and retro addition to powder rooms or kitchen backsplashes.
tiles.creator: Retro Tiles Co.

tiles.title: Limestone Honed Ivory
tiles.description: Smooth honed limestone in a soft ivory shade. Offers a sophisticated, understated elegance for large living areas.
tiles.creator: Nature Stone Imports
